


```{R}

# Generate 200 samples from N(0,1)
# plot a histogram of the data

x <- rnorm(200)
hist(x)


```




rmarkdown::pandoc_available()
rmarkdown::find_pandoc()
Sys.setenv(RSTUDIO_PANDOC="/home/amovas/data/.conda/envs/ha_proj/bin/pandoc")
file.copy(rmarkdown::pandoc_exec(), "/usr/local/bin/pandoc", overwrite = TRUE)
rmarkdown::pandoc_exec()

rmarkdown::render('~/data/genome-evo-proj/src/r-processing-scripts/reproduction/fred/rep1.Rmd', encoding = 'UTF-8')
